description: Collapse the bl-2e26 palimpsest (stale body + 13 append-only notes, several superseding earlier ones) into one coherent current spec body. Retire bl-f53a (subsumed by the blocker model in bl-a408; only residual = pure-metadata links stay core).
title: Consolidation: rewrite bl-2e26 body from the 13 notes into one current spec; retire bl-f53a
